tagline: The Operating System for Your Mind
mission: To provide high-impact psychological frameworks and productivity systems for the modern high-performer.

voice_attributes.language_style: Punchy, short sentences. No fluff. High density of information.

visual_identity.typography: High-contrast Sans-Serif (e.g., Inter, Montserrat, or Archivo Black)
visual_identity.imagery: Cinematic stock footage, dark academia, minimalist architecture, urban nightscapes, stoic statues, macro nature.
